role: Optional minimal operator shell. May evaluate ratpoison and DWM. Not part of Noether Core.
invariants: Noether Core must build without Birkhoff Bastion
Birkhoff Bastion must not enable default network services
window manager source/version must be pinned
DWM must remain candidate until stricter gate passes
ratpoison must remain candidate until accepted by component register
disqualifying_conditions: component enters Noether Core by dependency
unpinned window manager source or package
DWM accepted without stricter gate evidence
notes: Birkhoff Bastion is optional and non-authoritative unless a future gate promotes it.
Ratpoison and DWM are candidate-only in this pass.
